name: ai-context entry
purpose: Stable AI entrypoint. Read JSON indexes first, then load source markdown/rules/skills only when selected by task context.
defaultReadOrder: config/skills/skills.json only when skill selection is needed
config/rules/rules.json only when rule lookup is needed

routingDecision.projectsIndex: Read config/projects/index.json first as the candidate list. Use id, name, technologyFamilyId, path, and summary to choose matched project JSON files.
routingDecision.projectDetail: After selecting a project, read config/projects/<project-id>.json for doc path, mounted skills, scenes, rules, and source read policy.
routingDecision.scenesIndex: Read config/scenes/index.json as the candidate list when the task may involve a workflow scene or multiple projects.
routingDecision.sceneDetail: After selecting a scene, read config/scenes/<scene-id>.json for included projects, mounted scene rules, composition reason, environment switching, run/debug, and source scene doc path.
routingDecision.fallback: If no project or scene is clear, use projects index and scenes index to ask one concise clarification instead of reading all source documents.

sourceReadPolicy.projectDocs: Read docs/repos/*.md only after a project JSON is selected and the summary is insufficient.
sourceReadPolicy.scenes: Read docs/scenes/*.md only after a scene JSON is selected and detailed workflow text is needed.
sourceReadPolicy.rules: Read config/rules/rules.json for applyMode, globs, and whenToRead. Active rule sources under bundles/rules/** are Markdown .md files and are loaded only when a selected project, selected scene, or task gate requires full rule details. Project JSON triggers project-on-demand rules. Scene JSON triggers scene-on-demand rules. Read docs/reference/rules/** only when an active rule points there and compact guidance is insufficient.
sourceReadPolicy.skills: Read active bundles/skills/** only when a selected project JSON or explicit user request triggers the skill. Read docs/reference/skills/** only for archived detail when the active skill is insufficient.
sourceReadPolicy.profile: Read docs/person/profile.md only when long-term preferences or project map details matter.

taskFlow.currentWorkMarkdown: deprecated; do not read or update runtime/current-work.md
